title: MrBeast
body:
Adds MrBeast to Minecraft!

This mod was originally an April Fools mod released to our discord, and has been polished since then. The majority of the April Fools content has been removed, so if you are looking for the most cursed experience possible, join our discord!


When a MrBeast spawns, it will play a loud "MR BEAAST" sound. It will continue to play obnoxious ambient sounds. If you try to hit it, it will make more cursed sounds at you. If you kill MrBeast, more sounds.
